verb_inconsistencies.Commands: deploy creates app, add-unit adds units
verb_inconsistencies.Issue: Different lifecycle verbs for same resource family
bootstrap is not create-controller; kill vs destroy inconsistency
detect is missing; autoload is irregular

orphan_commands.Why Orphan: Get/set hybrid; no noun in name
Domain-specific verb; implicit noun is offer
Verb-noun exists but diff is rare in CLI
